author: Alan Feldman
text: Trey is an exceptional QA automation engineer with a very strong and diverse background building test automation frameworks, using proprietary and third party tools, and training/guiding QA and development teams in the execution of automation test suites. He's extremely analytical, able to deliver on difficult and challenging tasks, and brought innovative solutions for functional, performance, and load test automation of Invodo's media asset platform, content management, and reporting/analytics systems as well as the Invodo video player. He would be a great asset for any team looking to incorporate or improve QA/test automation into their product delivery processes.
